info.tailwind: bg-primary-50 border border-primary-200 text-primary-800 rounded-lg p-4

success.tailwind: bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-200 text-emerald-800 rounded-lg p-4

warning.tailwind: bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 text-amber-800 rounded-lg p-4

error.tailwind: bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-red-800 rounded-lg p-4
